commentary.summary: Production closed at 36,253.4 MT against 48,700 MT target, with 74.44% achievement. Dispatch was 35,370.8 MT, equal to 97.57% of production for the selected period. Average Jaw/VSI TPH was 112.99/100.74; review days below the weekly average before locking the next plan. Electrical consumption averaged 4.16 units/MT; prioritise checks on days above this level. Loader diesel consumption was 2,780 litres; monitor litres/MT alongside dispatch mix.
